content.summary: Virtual camera for Render TOP. Controls view, projection, FOV.

examples.label: Position camera for top-down view
examples.code:
c = op('cam1')
c.par.tx = 0
c.par.ty = 5
c.par.tz = 0
c.par.rx = -90
c.par.ry = 0
c.par.rz = 0

examples.label: Set field of view
examples.description: Set a 60-degree field of view for natural perspective.

examples.label: Set clipping planes for large scene
Orbit camera with time
examples.description: Use as expression on tx to orbit the camera horizontally.
